verification.title: Verification Required
verification.messagePrefix: To ensure your security, we'll send a verification code to your email
verification.messageSuffix: . The code will expire in 10 minutes.
verification.codeRequired: Please enter the verification code sent to your email.
verification.invalidCode: The verification code you entered is incorrect.
verification.expiredCode: The verification code has expired. Click Resend Code button below.
verification.resendPrefix: Didn't receive any? Please check your spam or
verification.resendCooldown: Please wait {seconds} seconds before requesting a new code.
